name: web_search
description: Search the live web for current information, news, or facts.

name: fetch_content
description: Scrape a URL, extract main content, and return a clean text summary.

name: list_files
description: List files and directories in a specified folder. Use recursive=true for a full tree view of the directory structure.

path.description: Absolute or relative path to list

recursive.description: If true, show a recursive tree view of all subdirectories

name: read_file
description: Read a file with AI-friendly line-based windowing. Returns formatted output with navigation hints.

path.description: Path to the file (relative to the sandbox base)

line_start.description: Starting line number (1-indexed). Use negative values to count from end.

name: write_file
description: Write text content to a file. Creates parent directories if needed.

path.description: Path where file will be written

name: append_to_file
description: Append text content to the end of an existing file without overwriting.

content.description: Text to append to the file

name: replace_in_file
description: Find and replace specific text in a file. If multiple occurrences exist, replaces all.

old_text.description: Text to find in the file

name: insert_after_marker
description: Insert text after a specific marker line in a file. Creates the file if it doesn't exist.

content.description: Text to insert after the marker

name: search_files
description: Search for text patterns within files in the sandbox directory.

query.description: Text or regex pattern to search for

path.description: Directory path to search in (relative to the sandbox base)

pattern_type.description: Whether to treat query as exact text or regex pattern

max_results.description: Maximum number of results to return

name: run_command
description: Execute a shell command within the sandbox directory. Policy blocks dangerous operations (rm -rf, sudo, apt, raw sh). Respects timeout and max_output limits.

max_output.description: Max characters of stdout/stderr to return

name: md_to_pdf
description: Convert a Markdown file to a styled PDF document using markdown, pdfkit, and wkhtmltopdf.

source_path.description: Path to the source Markdown file (relative to the sandbox base)

output_path.description: Path for the output PDF (defaults to same name with .pdf extension)

css_path.description: Optional path to a custom CSS stylesheet (relative to the sandbox base)

name: delete_file
description: Delete a file from the sandbox directory.

path.description: Path to the file to delete (relative to the sandbox base)

name: remove_directory
description: Remove a directory from the sandbox directory. Use recursive=true for non-empty directories.

path.description: Path to the directory to remove (relative to the sandbox base)

recursive.description: If true, removes directory and all contents recursively

name: store_context
description: Store or update project-specific context in SQLite knowledge base for cross-session persistence.

content.description: The actual context content to store

project.description: Project identifier to scope the context

name: query_context
description: Query stored context using keyword search or direct key lookup. Returns matching entries from SQLite knowledge base.

keyword.description: Keyword to search across all stored context (full-text search)

name: clear_context
description: Clear stored context entries. Either a specific key or all entries for a project.

key.description: Specific key to clear (omit to clear entire project)

name: list_projects
description: List all known projects in the SQLite knowledge base with last update timestamps.
